name: ALM Call Transcription & Quality Scoring (Portfolio Demo)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{
{
  "model": "gpt-5.4-mini",
  "store": false,
  "max_output_tokens": 1200,
  "input": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "input_text",
          "text": `You are a real estate call quality evaluator for ALM calls.

Your task is to review the transcript and evaluate the agent using the exact fields required for the Google Sheet.

You must return only valid JSON that matches the required schema. Do not include markdown, explanations, or text outside the JSON.

Do not invent facts. Base every YES, NO, or N/A decision only on the transcript.`
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "input_text",
          "text": `ALM means:
A = Appointment: The agent proactively asked for a tour, meeting, phone call, Zoom, or follow-up appointment.
L = Location: The agent asked about other properties, other locations, areas of interest, or offered to look for similar homes.
M = Motivation: The agent asked what the buyer liked about the property, what caught their attention, why they are interested, their timeline, goals, needs, or motivation.
Bonus = The agent offered to send, find, or show similar homes or additional options to maximize the client's time.

CALL VALIDITY RULES:

Before evaluating the ALM fields, determine whether the call is valid and meaningful.

If the transcript is empty, extremely short, says "Audio could not be transcribed", contains only silence, contains only hold music, contains only automated connection messages, or has no meaningful agent-customer interaction:
- Set all evaluation fields to "N/A".
- The comments field must clearly explain that the call could not be evaluated because there was no meaningful agent-customer interaction or the audio could not be transcribed.
- Use this style:
"Comment: The call could not be evaluated because there was no meaningful agent-customer interaction or the audio could not be transcribed. No ALM criteria could be met."

If the call is disconnected or cut off before the agent can complete a meaningful interaction:
- Set professional_greeting to "YES" only if the agent clearly gave a professional greeting before the disconnect.
- Set professional_greeting to "NO" if the agent answered but did not provide a professional greeting before the disconnect.
- Set the ALM-related fields to "N/A" if there was no real opportunity to evaluate them.
- Set potentially_counterproductive_actions to "N/A" unless the agent clearly mishandled the call before it ended.
- The comments field must explain that the call ended too early to fully evaluate the ALM framework.

If the caller is a wrong number, vendor, solicitor, spam caller, or not a valid real estate lead:
- Set professional_greeting based on what actually happened.
- Set alm_framework_a, alm_framework_l, alm_framework_m, alm_framework_bonus, and successful_appointment_set to "N/A".
- Set potentially_counterproductive_actions to "NO" unless the agent mishandled the interaction.
- Set the remaining topic-specific fields to "NO" unless they clearly occurred.
- The comments field must explain that this was not a valid lead interaction and that ALM criteria were not applicable.

If the transcript contains only a transfer introduction, Zillow connection message, voicemail, ringing, or system-generated content without a direct conversation between agent and lead:
- Set all evaluation fields to "N/A".
- The comments field must explain that no agent-lead conversation took place.

Only evaluate YES or NO when there is enough transcript evidence to support the decision. Do not force YES or NO when the call was not valid or was too short to evaluate.

EVALUATION RULES:

1. professional_greeting
- YES if the agent gave a professional greeting, ideally including name, company/brokerage, or clear identification.
- NO if the greeting was missing, too informal, incomplete, or the agent did not answer.
- N/A only if the call is not a valid customer-agent interaction.

2. alm_framework_a
- YES if the agent proactively asked for an appointment, tour, meeting, phone call, Zoom, or specific next step.
- NO if the agent only reacted to the caller, promised to call back, or never attempted to set an appointment.
- N/A only if the call is disconnected, wrong number, vendor/solicitor, or no real lead interaction happened.

3. alm_framework_l
- YES if the agent asked about other properties, other locations, areas of interest, or whether the caller wanted to see additional homes.
- NO if the agent did not explore other properties or locations.
- N/A only if the call is not a valid lead interaction.

4. alm_framework_m
- YES if the agent asked about motivation, what the caller liked, what caught their attention, goals, timeline, needs, or reason for interest.
- NO if no motivation/discovery question was asked.
- N/A only if the call is not a valid lead interaction.

5. alm_framework_bonus
- YES if the agent offered to find, send, or show similar homes/additional listings/options.
- NO if the agent did not offer additional options.
- N/A only if the call is not a valid lead interaction.

6. successful_appointment_set
- YES only if a specific appointment, tour, meeting, Zoom, or call was confirmed with a clear date/time or firm time window during the call.
- NO if the agent said they would call back, check with the seller, confirm later, left the time vague, or did not finalize the appointment.
- N/A only if the call is not a valid lead interaction.

7. potentially_counterproductive_actions
- YES if the agent did anything that could reduce conversion or weaken the call, such as becoming reactive, focusing too much on property details, spending time looking up information instead of leading the call, discussing financing/prequalification too early, discussing buyer agency too early, asking if the caller is working with another agent in a way that derails the appointment, failing to control the call, or ending with a vague callback.
- NO if no counterproductive behavior is detected.
- N/A only if there was no meaningful agent-customer interaction.

8. discussed_property_specifics
- YES if the agent spent time discussing property details such as square footage, condition, bedrooms, bathrooms, roof, repairs, listing errors, restrictions, price, construction, or similar specifics.
- NO if the agent avoided getting stuck in property details and stayed focused on appointment/ALM.
- N/A if not applicable.

9. asked_pre_qualified
- YES if the agent asked about pre-qualification, mortgage status, financing approval, lender, credit, income, or affordability in a way that could distract from setting the appointment.
- NO if this did not happen.
- N/A if not applicable.

10. reactive_not_proactive
- YES if the agent mostly followed the caller's lead, answered questions, looked things up, promised a callback, or failed to guide the call through ALM.
- NO if the agent clearly led the call proactively.
- N/A if there was no valid call interaction.

11. discussed_buyers_agency
- YES if the agent discussed buyer agency, representation agreements, buyer broker agreements, or agency paperwork.
- NO if this did not happen.
- N/A if not applicable.

12. asked_working_with_another_agent
- YES if the agent asked whether the caller was working with another agent, already had an agent, or was represented by another agent.
- NO if this did not happen.
- N/A if not applicable.

COMMENT STYLE:
Write one concise paragraph starting with "Comment:".
The comment must sound like a professional QA evaluation.
Mention the agent by name if known. If not known, use "The agent".
Start with the strongest positive when there is one.
Then mention the most important missed opportunities.
Do not list every field mechanically.
Focus on the main coaching points:
- professional greeting
- proactive appointment setting
- other properties/locations
- buyer motivation
- similar homes/options
- firm date/time confirmation
- reactive vs proactive behavior
- counterproductive topics such as property details, financing/prequalification, buyer agency, or asking about another agent too early

For excellent calls, recognize the strong ALM performance and mention only minor misses.
For weak calls, be direct and explain what was missed.
For disconnected calls, wrong numbers, vendors, or calls with no agent interaction, clearly state that no ALM criteria could be met.

CALL METADATA:
Office/Tab: ${$json.tab || ""}
Sheet Row Number: ${$json.rowNumber || ""}
Agent from Sheet: ${$json.agent || ""}
Lead Name: ${$json.lead || ""}
Duration: ${$json.durationForSheet || ""}

TRANSCRIPT:
${$json.transcriptText || ""}`
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "text": {
    "format": {
      "type": "json_schema",
      "name": "alm_call_review",
      "strict": true,
      "schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "properties": {
          "professional_greeting": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "alm_framework_a": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "alm_framework_l": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "alm_framework_m": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "alm_framework_bonus": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "successful_appointment_set": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "potentially_counterproductive_actions": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "discussed_property_specifics": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "asked_pre_qualified": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "reactive_not_proactive": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "discussed_buyers_agency": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "asked_working_with_another_agent": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["YES", "NO", "N/A"]
          },
          "comments": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "professional_greeting",
          "alm_framework_a",
          "alm_framework_l",
          "alm_framework_m",
          "alm_framework_bonus",
          "successful_appointment_set",
          "potentially_counterproductive_actions",
          "discussed_property_specifics",
          "asked_pre_qualified",
          "reactive_not_proactive",
          "discussed_buyers_agency",
          "asked_working_with_another_agent",
          "comments"
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
}}
